description: The SPEC §52.4.6 remedy: the same INSERT wrapped in a server function whose bound param is the parameter `${id}` (not the client-local cell `${@editingId}`), called with `logEdit(@editingId)`. The client-local value crosses the boundary as a parameter, so E-AUTH-001 does NOT fire (§52.4.4 / §52.4.6 / §52.11).
